title: manihot anomala subsp. glabrata
intro: Manihot anomala subsp. glabrata, also known as the smooth cassava or sweet cassava, is a variety of the cassava plant, a shrub native to the tropical regions of South America. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which can help to protect against cell damage and reduce the risk of chronic diseases. The health benefits of Manihot anomala subsp. glabrata include its potential to lower blood pressure, improve digestion, and provide relief from symptoms of arthritis and other inflammatory conditions. Herbal preparations of the plant, such as teas and infusions, can be used to harness its medicinal properties, although further research is needed to confirm the full range of its health benefits.
